name: aberdeen-1995-intersolv-virtual-data-warehouse
title: Exploring Intersolv's Virtual Data Warehouse
description: Aberdeen Group profile examining Intersolv's Virtual Data Warehouse approach, which provides unified access to distributed data sources without requiring physical data consolidation. Published October 1995. Structured as a Frictionless Data Package for archival and research use.

licenses.name: odc-pddl
licenses.title: Open Data Commons Public Domain Dedication and Licence

sources.title: Exploring Intersolv's Virtual Data Warehouse (Aberdeen Group, 1995)
sources.author: Aberdeen Group

resources.name: studies
resources.title: Studies
resources.description: Top-level study metadata for each Aberdeen Group research document in the collection.

fields.name: study_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the study (slug format)

fields.name: title
fields.description: Full title of the study

fields.name: author
fields.description: Author or authoring organization

fields.name: date
fields.description: Publication date (ISO 8601)

fields.name: type
fields.description: Study type code (FK → codes.code where scheme=study-type)

fields.name: domain
fields.description: Primary domain code (FK → codes.code where scheme=domain)

fields.name: methodology
fields.description: Comma-separated methodology codes (FK → codes.code where scheme=methodology)

fields.name: abstract
fields.description: Summary description of the study

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: Archival or canonical URL for the source document

fields.name: pdf_filename
fields.description: Filename of the source PDF

fields.name: page_count
fields.description: Number of pages in the source PDF

fields.name: word_count_approx
fields.description: Approximate word count of the source document

fields.name: study_num
fields.description: Sequential study number in the collection

resources.name: entities
resources.title: Entities
resources.description: Organizations, companies, and named entities mentioned in the study, with current status research.

fields.name: entity_id
fields.description: Unique entity identifier

fields.name: study_id
fields.description: FK → studies.study_id

fields.name: name
fields.description: Entity name as referenced in study

fields.name: entity_type
fields.description: Entity type code (FK → codes.code where scheme=entity-type)

fields.name: description
fields.description: Description of the entity

fields.name: hq_location
fields.description: Headquarters location at time of study

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current status code (FK → codes.code where scheme=entity-status)

fields.name: status_detail
fields.description: Narrative explanation of current entity status

fields.name: status_source_url
fields.description: URL of source used to determine current status

resources.name: technologies
resources.title: Technologies
resources.description: Technologies, products, standards, and architectural patterns mentioned in the study, with lifecycle status.

fields.name: tech_id
fields.description: Unique technology identifier

fields.name: study_id
fields.description: FK → studies.study_id

fields.name: name
fields.description: Technology or product name

fields.name: category
fields.description: Technology category (e.g., software-product, standard, architecture-pattern)

fields.name: vendor
fields.description: Vendor or standards body associated with technology

fields.name: description
fields.description: Description of the technology as referenced in the study

fields.name: lifecycle_status
fields.description: Current lifecycle status (FK → codes.code where scheme=tech-lifecycle)

fields.name: lifecycle_note
fields.description: Narrative explanation of current lifecycle status

fields.name: successor_technology
fields.description: Technology or technologies that succeeded this one, if applicable

resources.name: observations
resources.title: Observations
resources.description: Individual claims, facts, user feedback, market observations, product features, and pricing statements extracted from the study.

fields.name: obs_id
fields.description: Unique observation identifier

fields.name: study_id
fields.description: FK → studies.study_id

fields.name: observation_type
fields.description: Observation type code (FK → codes.code where scheme=observation-type)

fields.name: subject_entity_id
fields.description: FK → entities.entity_id (nullable)

fields.name: subject_tech_id
fields.description: FK → technologies.tech_id (nullable)

fields.name: text
fields.description: Full text of the observation, paraphrased or quoted from source

fields.name: sentiment
fields.description: Sentiment code (FK → codes.code where scheme=sentiment)

fields.name: page_num
fields.description: Source page number in PDF

fields.name: section
fields.description: Section heading in the source document

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Comma-separated topic tags for filtering and analysis

resources.name: codes
resources.title: Codes
resources.description: Controlled vocabulary of codes used across all tables for types, statuses, domains, and other categorical fields.

fields.name: code
fields.description: Unique code identifier (format: scheme:value)

fields.name: label
fields.description: Human-readable label for the code

fields.name: scheme
fields.description: Code scheme/namespace (e.g., study-type, methodology, domain)

fields.name: parent_code
fields.description: FK → codes.code for hierarchical codes (nullable)

fields.name: definition
fields.description: Definition of the code
